name: solo-npm
description: Twelve AI skills wrapping every npm operator capability solo devs use — publish, version, dist-tag, deprecate, audit, outdated, view, owner, login + 2FA + OIDC — plus the safety gates and infrastructure around them. Bootstrap: /solo-npm:init scaffolds release.yml (with dist-tag detection) + publishConfig + .nvmrc + consumer wrappers + .solo-npm/state.json + .claude/settings.json (idempotent); /solo-npm:trust configures OIDC Trusted Publishing via the npm-trust CLI. Per-release: /solo-npm:release is the universal release entry (auto-chains to /solo-npm:prerelease on pre-release version; offers /solo-npm:deprecate after major); /solo-npm:verify runs lint + typecheck + test + build + pkg-check (manifest completeness validation with auto-fix offers). Lifecycle transitions: /solo-npm:prerelease handles start/bump/promote pre-release lifecycle (alpha/beta/rc); /solo-npm:hotfix patches previous stable majors on a <major>.x branch with cherry-pick automation for forward/back-port. Operate: /solo-npm:status shows a multi-channel dashboard with maintenance lines; /solo-npm:audit runs security audit with risk triage (chains to /deps or /deprecate); /solo-npm:deps orchestrates dep upgrades with verify gates; /solo-npm:dist-tag manages dist-tags post-publish (cleanup stale @next, repoint @latest, channels); /solo-npm:deprecate retires versions cleanly (mass + reversible, range-aware); /solo-npm:owner manages maintainers across the portfolio. /solo-npm:release and /solo-npm:verify are designed to be wrapped per-repo via .claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md thin wrappers. /solo-npm:hotfix and /solo-npm:deps compose with addyosmani/agent-skills' debugging-and-error-recovery when installed.
